rules: Headings max size: text-6xl (use clamp or responsive classes sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl).
Use mono font for keyboard shortcuts (kbd), code snippets, dates, and overlines.
Never center align default body text, left-align for readability. Center headings only if it improves hierarchy.
Ensure hierarchy gap: H1 to subtitle must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Follow a tasteful monochrome aesthetic with a single restrained white/silver accent (Apple-native feel).
Use deep dark colors for background. Avoid generic gradients; use solid darks with subtle radial light glows.
Ensure WCAG AA or APCA compliant contrast ratios for text.

layouts.hero: Massive typography, left-aligned or centered, followed by a glowing macOS window mockup.
layouts.features: Bento-style grid ('Tetris' grid mode). Use gap-6 or gap-8. Span logic to create asymmetry.
layouts.comparison: Side-by-side grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2. Windows/Standard macOS (messy, chaotic) vs ProfilePilot (clean, organized).
rules: Use generous spacing (p-12, p-16) for sections.
Grid items must be direct children of the grid container.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a 1px border-white/10 for the sticky header and the interactive menu bar. NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds for overlays.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain overlay on the page to add tactile depth and prevent flat black spaces.
visual_enhancers.lighting: Use subtle radial-gradients for glowing backgrounds behind hero and key features, simulating studio lighting.
visual_enhancers.macos_chrome: Use real macOS window chrome mockups (traffic light dots, smooth rounded corners: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl).
visual_enhancers.keyboard_shortcuts: Style <kbd> tags as physical keys with inset shadows, border-b-2, and subtle rounded corners to mimic tactile depth (e.g. ⌥⌘L).

header.description: Sticky nav with glassmorphism. Logo + Links + Primary CTA.
header.rules: z-50, backdrop-blur-xl, bg-black/60, bottom border border-white/10.

hero.description: Text: 'Fix macOS's broken multi-profile Chrome experience'. Subtitle explaining <100ms startup and native SwiftUI.
hero.rules: Include a mock macOS window showcasing the product. Use max-overlay opacity rules if using background images.

interactive_demo.description: A live interactive demo pane resembling the macOS menu bar.
interactive_demo.rules: Must be clickable. When clicked, opens a popover showing the 'AI Workspace' search (e.g., typing 'Laravel' -> launch stack). Use Framer Motion for the popover entrance.

architecture_section.description: Explains bundle wrapper technique, LaunchServices, Accessibility APIs.
architecture_section.rules: Use mono font for technical terms. Show pseudo-code or terminal aesthetics (Retro-Futurism/Terminal look but clean).

downloads.description: macOS .dmg placeholder + 'Build from source' for Xcode.
downloads.rules: Use strong pill-shaped CTAs. Provide clear versioning text.

roadmap.rules: Use a subtle left border line and nodes. Mono font for dates.

security.description: Privacy manifesto: Offline, no telemetry, no history access.

faq.rules: Customize to match dark theme (white/10 borders, white text on hover).

background_texture.description: Abstract dark 3D glass texture. Use with very low opacity (10-20%) and blend-mode as a background for the hero or global wrapper.

laptop_context.description: Dark sleek laptop mockup. Can be used in the Architecture or Problem vs Solution section to add cinematic tech feel.

media.icons: Use lucide-react for all standard icons. Do NOT use emojis.

rules: Framer motion for subtle staggered entrances.
Interactive menu bar popover must animate smoothly (scale and fade in).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You are using React with standard JavaScript (.js/.jsx), NOT TypeScript (.tsx). Adapt all code and Shadcn components accordingly.
You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight (think Raycast + Linear).
DO NOT use dark colors as standard gradients. Use solid dark colors with subtle radial light glows if needed.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in App.css (no text-align: center).
Use modern pill-shaped or sharp rounded-md buttons with clear focus states.
NEVER use emojis for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus).
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements.
